one_line_risk: FR-CF-01 resolved — both Tracking Center readers now query payload->'consent_flags' (top-level), matching the writer; synthetic SQL-path check confirms a consented event now counts (consent_total/granted=1, has_consent=true) where the bounced path read 0; R2 isolation keystone byte-identical/untouched, master merge wires both Phase-1 ingest + Razorpay settlement consumers cleanly. Only residual: no automated test covers the consent read-path round-trip (tracked, same class as LOW SEC-CF-01).

tracked_findings.title: No regression test covers the consent read-path round-trip
tracked_findings.detail: FR-CF-01 was found by inspection and fixed by inspection; no test drives a consented event into Bronze then asserts consent_total>=1 / has_consent=true through getTrackingHealth/getRecentEvents. Add a writer->reader positive-control e2e on the next infra-bound spin. Same class as SEC-CF-01.

tracked_findings.title: dedup-observability E2E asserts metric via incrementCounter directly instead of through CollectorEventConsumer:108-114. Shipped control correct; only the test assertion is loose. Non-blocking.
audit_log test-read uses superuser pool because audit_log is RLS-disabled by design (forensic SoR). Write path under brain_app. Acceptable, no leak.
stream-worker tsc TS2307 on worker-secrets.ts -> AwsSecretsManager.js confirmed present at cb22341 (pre-fix). Outside this diff, unrelated, non-blocking.
